// 01 — about me

Who I Am

I'm Sriyanka Kosuri, an AI/ML Engineering student at BV Raju Institute of Technology, Hyderabad. I'm passionate about building systems that bridge the gap between complex machine learning research and real-world impact.

My work spans Computer Vision, Natural Language Processing, and Deep Learning — from detecting defects on printed circuit boards to recognising financial entities with transformer models.

I thrive at the intersection of research and engineering, with a keen eye for detail and a drive to publish meaningful work. I'm always looking for the next problem worth solving.

// 04 — work

Featured Projects

PROJECT 01
Named Entity Recognition in Finance
  • Built a Fin-NER model using FinBERT with linguistic & statistical features
  • Improved detection of complex multi-word financial entities
  • Enhanced accuracy for sentiment analysis and risk assessment
FinBERTNLPPythonFinance
PROJECT 02
PCB Defect Detection with Severity Grading
  • Developed CNN-based model detecting missing holes, shorts, opens & spurious copper
  • Applied image preprocessing & data augmentation to boost accuracy
  • Automated severity grading to enhance quality control workflows
CNNOpenCVDeep LearningPython
